title: Clinical Analysis Quality Verdict
description: Quality judgment on a clinical analysis run. Summarizes checklist-based evaluation of statistical methodology, SAP compliance, assumption verification, and reporting adequacy. Verdicts gate downstream usage: PASS allows results to propagate to the clinical study report; CONDITIONAL requires remediation before use; FAIL blocks all downstream consumption.

verdict.description: Overall quality verdict. PASS = all mandatory checks passed; CONDITIONAL = minor issues require remediation; FAIL = blocking issues found.

verdict_summary.description: One-paragraph human-readable summary of the verdict rationale.

checklist_items.description: Ordered list of checklist evaluation results.

check_category.description: Quality domain this check belongs to.

check_description.description: Plain-language description of what this check evaluates.

severity_if_fail.description: Severity level if this check fails.

finding.description: Detailed finding when status is 'fail' or 'conditional'. Null when status is 'pass'.

sap_reference.description: SAP section or table number relevant to this check.

critical_findings.description: Blocking issues that prevent analysis results from being used. Empty when verdict is PASS.

impact.description: How this issue affects the validity or regulatory acceptability of the analysis.

remediation_required.description: Specific action needed to resolve this finding.

related_check_ids.description: Check IDs from checklist_items that triggered this finding.

recommendations.description: Non-blocking suggestions for improving analysis quality or report clarity.

related_check_ids.description: Check IDs that prompted this recommendation.

reviewer.description: Name, role, or identifier of the person or system performing the quality review.

review_date.description: Date the quality review was completed.

review_round.description: Sequential review round number. Incremented on re-review after remediation.

target_review_rounds.description: Maximum number of review rounds allowed before escalation.

audit_run_id.description: Reference to the audit run_id in audit_sidecar.schema.json, linking this verdict to its evidence trail.
